subtitles.original: 雨が上がれば
subtitles.english: When the rain stops,

subtitles.original: 愛もその横顔も
subtitles.english: both love and that profile

subtitles.original: 誰かのものになるのでしょう
subtitles.english: will belong to someone else, I suppose.

subtitles.original: 嘘っぱちのファンデーションも全部今夜のためよ
subtitles.english: All the fake foundation is just for tonight.

subtitles.original: なのに一体全体如何して如何して何故何故?
subtitles.english: But why on earth, why, why, why?

subtitles.original: 不安定なカンテラ何処まで行くの
subtitles.english: This unstable lantern, how far will it go?

subtitles.original: あなた一切合切放り去ってもう
subtitles.english: You've abandoned everything already.

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: I'm not joking, Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous!

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even when that time comes, there's nothing we can do.

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコり化するだけ
subtitles.english: Vague truths only make things melancholic.

subtitles.original: あたしをさあ掻っ攫って今テイクオンミー
subtitles.english: Come on, snatch me away, take on me now!

subtitles.original: はあ ちゃんちゃらおかしな法度ばっかで食指がびくともしないわ
subtitles.english: Haa, with nothing but ridiculous rules, my interest isn't even piqued.

subtitles.original: 実態の無い感情放っておいたって策略なんてありゃあせんのに何故
subtitles.english: Even if I leave my formless emotions alone, why is there no strategy?

subtitles.original: ああもう懲り懲りよ あたしの渇となる気質も
subtitles.english: Ah, I've had enough! Even my thirst-inducing nature,

subtitles.original: じっと堪えて取り繕ってはとうとう臨界点
subtitles.english: patiently enduring and keeping up appearances, has finally reached its limit.

subtitles.original: 年がら年中リップサービス鈍感カマしては辟易
subtitles.english: Lip service all year round, acting dense, I'm sick of it.

subtitles.original: どんがらがっしゃんフィールガールは涙の目にも鬼
subtitles.english: The crash-and-burn emotional girl is a demon even with teary eyes.

subtitles.original: 今や頭の中のミュージックのせいであなたの話は一向に聴き取れない
subtitles.english: Now, because of the music in my head, I can't make out a single word of yours.

subtitles.original: 少しは真当なこと言って
subtitles.english: Say something sensible for once.

subtitles.original: 回り出すターンテーブル ねえ全部忘れさせてよ
subtitles.english: The turntable starts to spin, hey, let me forget everything.

subtitles.original: だけど一体全体如何して如何して何故何故?
subtitles.english: But why on earth, why, why, why?

subtitles.original: 不安定なカンテラ消えない侭ね
subtitles.english: This unstable lantern remains lit, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: あなた一口両舌食い違ってもう
subtitles.english: You're speaking with a double tongue, we're totally at odds.

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: I'm not joking, Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous!

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even when that time comes, there's nothing we can do.

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコり化するだけ
subtitles.english: Vague truths only make things melancholic.

subtitles.original: あたしを今...
subtitles.english: Me, now...

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: I'm not joking, Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous!

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even when that time comes, there's nothing we can do.

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ないわ 感情なんてランドリーで落とすだけ
subtitles.english: How pathetic, emotions can just be washed away in the laundry.

subtitles.original: あたしと確かめ合ってイエロー・マジック
subtitles.english: Verify it with me, Yellow Magic.

subtitles.original: アイアイヤ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: Ai-ya-ya, Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous!

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even when that time comes, there's nothing we can do.

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコり化するだけ
subtitles.english: Vague truths only make things melancholic.

subtitles.original: あたしをさあ掻っ攫って今テイクオンミー
subtitles.english: Come on, snatch me away, take on me now!

subtitles.original: AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover!
subtitles.english: AZKi 8th Birthday Live: Crossover!

subtitles.original: 最後はチームみんなで歌い上げます
subtitles.english: Lastly, everyone in the team will sing together!

subtitles.original: 平成・赤チーム
subtitles.english: Heisei Red Team!

subtitles.original: アニメ「とある科学の超電磁砲」より今も愛され続けるアニソンの王道「only my railgun」
subtitles.english: From the anime 'A Certain Scientific Railgun,' the classic anime song loved to this day, 'only my railgun'!

subtitles.original: 続いて令和・青チーム
subtitles.english: Next up, Reiwa Blue Team!

subtitles.original: アニメ「呪術廻戦」より鮮烈でエモーショナルな青春ソング「青のすみか」
subtitles.english: From the anime 'Jujutsu Kaisen,' the vivid and emotional youth anthem, 'Where Our Blue Is'!

subtitles.original: ステージでぶつかる電撃と呪力。2曲続けてどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Electricity and cursed energy clash on stage. Please enjoy both songs in a row!

subtitles.original: 放て! 心に刻んだ夢を 未来さえ置き去りにして
subtitles.english: Fire it! Leave even the future behind, along with the dreams engraved in your heart.

subtitles.original: 限界など知らない 意味無い!
subtitles.english: I know no limits, they're meaningless!

subtitles.original: この能力が光散らす その先に遥かな想いを
subtitles.english: This power scatters light, projecting distant feelings beyond.

subtitles.original: 歩いてきた この道を 振り返ることしか
subtitles.english: If there is nothing else I can do but look back...

subtitles.original: 出来ないなら... 今ここで全てを壊せる
subtitles.english: ...on the path I have walked, I can destroy everything here and now.

subtitles.original: 暗闇に堕ちる街並み 人はどこまで立ち向かえるの?
subtitles.english: As the townscape falls into darkness, how far can people stand against it?

subtitles.original: 加速するその痛みから 誰かをきっと守れるよ
subtitles.english: From this accelerating pain, I can surely protect someone.

subtitles.original: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way.
subtitles.english: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way.

subtitles.original: Only my RAILGUN can shoot it. 今すぐ
subtitles.english: Only my RAILGUN can shoot it, right now!

subtitles.original: 身体中を
subtitles.english: Through my entire body...

responses.thoughts:
**Finalized Subtitle Generation Plan**

Okay, here's how I'm approaching this subtitle generation. The goal is to produce synchronized subtitles in both Japanese and English, adhering to a strict set of rules. I need to make sure I get the exact timings for each line, truncate the lines aggressively if need be, and follow formatting requirements, too. The input's a JSON file with track information.

First, I'm going to parse the provided JSON to grab the song segments. There are three sections: the initial track ("Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous"), an MC transition that includes spoken introductions, and then the track "only my railgun". I have to transcribe vocals only, and leave out any closed captions tags, like "[applause]". No speaker labels either, unless they're specifically requested.

Now, for segment one, "Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous," I'm analyzing the audio. I went through the track and broke it down into smaller parts, making sure to identify the start and end of each syllable or short phrase. I'm focusing on aligning the audio exactly with the transcription. I'm going through each segment and its Japanese text, and then matching the English translations to it. I will keep track of the precise timestamps for each line.

The second segment covers the MC transition. I am going to watch and listen carefully to the audio in this part, since I need to pick up on what the speaker is saying at the transitions. This includes the announcements, such as "AZKi 8th Birthday Live CROSSOVER," the team introductions ("Heisei Red Team!," "Reiwa Blue Team!"), and the song descriptions. I need to get the precise timings for each spoken phrase.

Finally, for the last track "only my railgun," I'll repeat the process from the beginning: analyze the audio, break down the song into syllables and phrases, get the exact timestamps and match that with the Japanese transcript and its translation.

I'm double-checking everything to ensure that all timestamps align precisely with the audio, and that the text lines are truncated to fit the limits. The format of the timestamps is `MM:SS.mmm`. I am going to make sure that no extra characters or symbols creep in, too. I'm confirming all of the final values, making very sure that the line starts and end with the same vocal activation. I am ready to output the JSON now.
